name: ShortcutBar
description: ShortcutBar: a horizontal footer bar that displays quick key bindings

api.signature: new ShortcutBar(items: ShortcutItem[] = [], style: Partial<Style> = {}, opts: ShortcutBarOptions = {},)

props.name: keyStyle
props.description: Custom styles for the key (e.g., fg/bg colors)

props.name: labelStyle
props.description: Custom styles for the label text
